assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_051",
  "rule_id": "Add nosuid Option to /home",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "Standard STIG hardening of /home mount; adding nosuid is low risk and reversible.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "filesystem_permission_change"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Edit /etc/fstab to include the 'nosuid' option for the /home mount point",
    "Apply changes with 'mount -o remount /home' or reboot if required"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": false,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": true}
